summary.zh: 跨会话协作初版上线；新增 Grok 订阅登录；本机端口改为随机自愈；升级后会展示更新摘要。同时修复会话压缩被拦截、首条发送残留、设置弹窗宽度与 Grok 对话请求头等问题。
summary.en: Cross-session collaboration v0 ships, with Grok subscription login, self-healing random loopback ports, and post-update release notes. Also fixes blocked session compaction, leftover first-message draft text, settings modal width, and Grok chat request headers.

summary.zh: 助手可在会话间读取、投递与创建草稿；目标会话会显示来源消息卡，发送/创建前有确认草稿卡，确认状态会留在源会话。
summary.en: The assistant can read, deliver, and draft across sessions. Target sessions show origin cards; send/create flows use confirmation drafts whose state persists on the source session.

details.zh: 包含会话工具读侧/写侧、投递单点、草稿 one-shot 存储，以及 auto 模式下的权限分类。
details.en: Includes session tool read/write paths, a single delivery point, one-shot draft storage, and permission classification in auto mode.

details.zh: 草稿卡视觉与字段序已收束：无头化创建卡、助手→标题→首条消息，来源卡固定宽度。
details.en: Draft-card visuals are tightened: headerless create cards, assistant→title→first-message order, and fixed-width origin cards.

sources.title: feat(session-collab): 跨 session 协作 v0 收尾
feat(session-collab): 目标 session 的 Agent 来源消息卡

title.zh: 新增 Grok 订阅登录

summary.zh: 设置里可用独立的 xAI OAuth（设备码）登录 Grok 订阅；原有 xAI API Key 路径不变。
summary.en: Settings now supports a separate xAI OAuth device-code login for Grok subscriptions; existing xAI API-key access is unchanged.

details.zh: 随后补齐 Grok CLI 代理所需请求头，避免订阅登录后聊天因缺少客户端版本头失败。
details.en: Follow-up adds required Grok CLI proxy headers so subscription chat no longer fails with a missing client-version header.

sources.title: feat(providers): add Grok OAuth subscription login
fix(providers): send Grok CLI proxy headers for xAI OAuth chat

title.zh: 升级后首启展示更新摘要
title.en: Show release notes on first launch after update

summary.zh: 版本变化后第一次打开主窗口会弹一次更新完成公告；手动安装升级的用户也能看到「更新了什么」。
summary.en: After a version change, the first main-window launch shows a one-time update announcement, including for manual installs.

details.zh: 全新安装只静默记录版本，不打扰；摘要缺失或版本不匹配时退化为纯版本号文案。
details.en: Fresh installs silently seed the seen version; missing or mismatched digests fall back to a plain version string.

sources.title: feat(desktop): 升级后首启公告基建（NoticeDialog + release digest 随包展示）

title.zh: 本机端口改为随机分配并自愈
title.en: Loopback port becomes random and self-healing

summary.zh: 本机 loopback 不再固定 14500：新安装随机选港；仍用 14500 的旧配置会在启动时静默迁到随机端口；端口被占时自动换港继续启动。
summary.en: Loopback no longer sticks to 14500: new installs pick a random port, legacy 14500 configs migrate silently, and occupied ports auto-shift so startup can continue.

details.zh: LAN / 自定义远程端口仍是对外契约，不会自动改；用环境变量钉死端口时也不迁移。
details.en: LAN and custom-remote ports remain hard contracts and are not auto-changed; an env-pinned port also skips migration.

sources.title: feat(server): loopback 端口随机分配与运行期自愈，弃用固定默认 14500

summary.zh: 从未改过工具设置的助手，Beautify 从默认关闭改为默认开启；已经手动关掉的不受影响。
summary.en: For agents that never changed tool settings, Beautify flips from default-off to default-on; explicit opt-outs stay respected.

sources.title: feat(tools): beautify 毕业为默认开启

title.zh: 修复首条发送后输入框残留正文
title.en: Fix leftover text after sending the first message

summary.zh: 首页发出第一条消息后，输入框会按消费契约清空，不再留下刚发出去的正文。
summary.en: After sending the first home-screen message, the composer clears as expected instead of keeping the sent text.

sources.title: fix: 首条发送后输入框残留已发送正文

title.zh: 修复会话压缩被缓存守卫拦截
title.en: Fix session compaction blocked by cache guard

summary.zh: 手动/自动压缩与分支摘要不再被主会话缓存前缀守卫误拦，压缩可正常完成；普通对话轮次仍保持严格校验。
summary.en: Manual/automatic compaction and branch summaries are no longer rejected by the main-session cache-prefix guard; normal chat turns stay strictly checked.

sources.title: fix(session): allow Pi native compaction through cache guard

title.zh: 修复设置弹窗被撑宽与定宽回退
title.en: Fix settings modal stretch and restore fixed width

summary.zh: 供应商等宽页不再把设置弹窗撑破；设置壳恢复 640 定宽，页内过长文案改为省略。
summary.en: Wide provider pages no longer stretch the settings modal; the shell returns to a fixed 640 width with in-page ellipsis for overflow.

sources.title: fix(settings): 防止供应商 wide 页把设置弹窗撑宽
fix(settings): 恢复 640 定宽，撤销 1fr 压短，页内超长省略

summary.zh: 预览里的 Markdown 表格会按内容收窄，不再无谓拉满宽度。
summary.en: Markdown tables in preview shrink to their content instead of stretching full width.

sources.title: fix(preview): shrink markdown tables to content

title.zh: 修复 Windows 安装清理进程误判
title.en: Fix Windows installer process cleanup false negatives

summary.zh: Windows 上进程查询失败时不再当成「没有进程」，会回退到镜像名清理，降低升级残留。
summary.en: When Windows process queries fail, the installer no longer treats that as “no process” and falls back to image-name cleanup.

details.zh: 残留 server 仍存活时会保留 server-info.json，并在端口冲突时快速失败提示。
details.en: If a residual server is still alive, server-info.json is kept and port conflicts fail fast with guidance.

sources.title: fix(installer): Windows 进程查询失败不再当作无进程，回退镜像名清理
fix(desktop): 残留 server 存活时保留 server-info.json 并按端口冲突 fail-fast

title.zh: 通用确认/公告弹窗基建
title.en: Shared confirm and notice dialog primitives

summary.zh: 补齐 window-surface、带作用域 Overlay 与 ConfirmDialog，后续系统确认与公告弹窗走同一套视觉与焦点契约。
summary.en: Adds window-surface, scoped Overlay, and ConfirmDialog so later system confirms and notices share one visual and focus contract.

sources.title: feat(ui): 从 infinity 线搬运 window-surface + Overlay(scope) + ConfirmDialog 通用弹窗基建
